Bash(cd /home/matthewh/chatty-commander && for f in tests/test_*.py; do
  echo -n "$f: "
  result=$(timeout 15 python3 -m pytest "$f" --tb=no -q --no-cov 2>&1 | tail -1)
  if [ $? -eq 124 ]; then
    echo "HANG"
  else
    echo "$result"
  fi
done)

Bash(cd /home/matthewh/chatty-commander && for f in tests/test_advisors_context.py tests/test_advisors_service_real_llm.py tests/test_agents_api.py tests/test_avatar_api.py tests/test_cli_cli_coverage.py tests/test_cli_features.py tests/test_core_routes.py tests/test_llm_backends_coverage.py tests/test_obs_metrics.py tests/test_openapi.py tests/test_security.py tests/test_voice.py tests/test_web_server_e2e.py tests/test_web_server.py; do
  echo "=== $f ==="
  # Collect test names
  tests=$(timeout 10 python3 -m pytest "$f" --co -q --no-cov 2>&1 | grep "::" | head -40)
  echo "$tests"
  echo ""
done)

    with patch('chatty_commander.llm.manager.LLMManager'):
        with patch('chatty_commander.llm.backends.OpenAIBackend'):
            with patch('chatty_commander.llm.backends.OllamaBackend'):
                from chatty_commander.web.web_mode import create_app
                app = create_app(no_auth=True)
                print('OK - app created')
" 2>&1)

" 2>&1)
